work_items.name: Audit logging and SIEM retention setup

evidence.claim: TLS 1.3 enforced for all traffic in transit
PII data encrypted at rest in the database via KMS
OAuth token auth enforced at the public API gateway
Audit log retention configured with SIEM
RBAC access review performed quarterly for IAM roles
Backup and disaster recovery with RPO/RTO replication tested
Runtime monitoring and alerting configured with metrics
